    Method
    Description
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withAlias(@Nullable String alias)
    Sets a configured alias for the table.
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withContext(Context context)
     
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withDelimitIdentifiers(boolean delimitIdentifiers)
    If true, then the table identifiers will be delimited at runtime.
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withDomainObjectName(@Nullable String domainObjectName)
    Set the configured domain object name for this table.
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withDomainObjectRenamingRule(@Nullable DomainObjectRenamingRule domainObjectRenamingRule)
    Sets a domain object renaming rule.
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withIgnoreQualifiersAtRuntime(boolean ignoreQualifiersAtRuntime)
    If true, then the catalog and schema qualifiers will be ignored when composing fully qualified names in the generated SQL.
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withIntrospectedCatalog(@Nullable String introspectedCatalog)
    Sets the actual catalog of the table as returned from DatabaseMetaData.
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withIntrospectedSchema(@Nullable String introspectedSchema)
    Sets the actual schema of the table as returned from DatabaseMetaData.
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withIntrospectedTableName(String introspectedTableName)
    Sets the actual table name as returned from DatabaseMetaData.
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withRuntimeCatalog(@Nullable String runtimeCatalog)
    Sets the runtime catalog.
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withRuntimeSchema(@Nullable String runtimeSchema)
    Sets the runtime schema.
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder
    FullyQualifiedTable.Builder.withRuntimeTableName(@Nullable String runtimeTableName)
    Sets the runtime table name.
